The question is asking to determine how many clerks began their service before the year 1959. Since each row represents a clerk and the "started" column indicates the year they began service, we need to filter the rows where the "started" value is less than 1959. We can use the f_group_column(started) operation to group the clerks based on their starting year to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to determine the number of clerks who started before the year 1959. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "started" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(started) operation. This will allow us to see the clerks who started in the earliest years and count how many of them began before 1959.

Explanation: The clerks who started before 1959 are Kenneth W. Dam and Alan C. Kohn (both started in 1957), and William C. Canby, Jr. and Heywood H. Davis (both started in 1958). Therefore, there are 4 clerks who started before 1959.
